items.name: Black 2000s Washed Out Suede Boots
items.description:
Step into the past with a modern twist in these cute silk boots, inspired by the bold fashion of the 2000s! With their luxe, silky texture and chic design, these boots bring a touch of glamour and nostalgia to any look. Perfect for adding a pop of Y2K flair, they’re versatile enough to dress up any outfit, whether you're going for playful or polished. Show off your style with these effortlessly cool boots that take you straight back to the iconic fashion of the early 2000s!

Made for it-girl body (Elevated) :


Join Fashion Diaries for recolors and many more items! <3 :

items.name: Chains 💎
items.description:
This awesome and classic iced out diamond chain necklace has a subtle glowing effect in bright light environments . It's great for the coolest outfits that want awesome luxury sparkly diamonds look along with a magic glow crystal . Whether you're dressing emo / scene / goth / punk / Y2K / retro or any style -- wear this epic necklace . The amulet / gem part of this necklace has a summer ombre effect .

items.name: Forsaken Maskroot
items.description:
“They carved it from the oldest tree in the Hollowing Woods. The roots bled. The mask watched.”

Once worn by the first Maskroot cultist who vanished beneath the forest floor, this cursed mask still hums with the whispers of the buried. Its triple eye sigil marks you as one of the Forsaken those who see what should never be seen. The antlers aren’t grown. They’re taken. And the stains? Not all of them are yours.

Wearing this may attract the attention of something ancient. Something hungry.
